ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Accordion supplies accessible single or multiple disclosures with triggers and content; a live overview of the current expansion set remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves native disclosure and heading semantics while optionally deriving a polite expansion overview from the same controlled or uncontrolled root state.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas panels, Ink separators, strong trigger type, a Green expanded signal, the shared Violet focus seam, restrained corners, and reduced-motion-safe disclosure transitions form the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A consumer formatter receives the current expanded keys and may render a concise polite status rail for long or multi-open accordions.

api.enableWhen: Pass a formatter that returns non-empty localized accessible content for the current expanded keys.

disabledBehavior.ui: No expansion-summary rail is rendered when the formatter is omitted or returns null, false, or empty content.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Single or multiple disclosure state follows the ordinary accordion path.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No role=status, live region, or summary text is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated heading, button, disclosure, disabled, keyboard, summary-removal, axe, RTL, narrow, forced-colors, and reduced-motion coverage is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers controlled/uncontrolled expansion, native activation, roving focus, disabled items, and clean summary removal.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Current screen-reader, speech, switch, touch-device, and relevant manual evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Breadcrumb supplies a navigation hierarchy with links, current page, separators, and consumer-composed ellipsis; bounded responsive hierarchy recovery remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora optionally derives a compact path that keeps hidden ancestors recoverable through native details while preserving the complete ordered hierarchy as the plain baseline.

visualSignature.summary: Ink link structure, a Green current-page signal, literal Canvas overflow surface, strong hierarchy, the Violet focus seam, restrained corners, and reduced-motion-safe reveal keep the breadcrumb in the Mergora family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A bounded compact hierarchy retains the first, tail, current page, and hidden ancestors through a native details disclosure.

api.enableWhen: Keep collapse true and optionally set maxVisible to an integer of at least two.

disabledBehavior.ui: Only the complete ordered breadcrumb hierarchy renders.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No compact duplicate or native details disclosure is created.
disabledBehavior.events: No details toggle path or hidden-message resolution occurs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No compact hierarchy, disclosure name, hidden-path copy, or duplicate navigation output is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated landmark, list, current-page, safe-link, clean compact-output removal, axe, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion coverage is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers hierarchy validation, localized responsive recovery, real links, safe hrefs, and complete enhancement-off cleanup.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Collapsible supplies controlled or uncontrolled disclosure root, trigger, and content; concise visible state context remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps aria-expanded authoritative while optionally deriving localized visible open or closed context from the same controlled or uncontrolled disclosure state.

visualSignature.summary: A literal Canvas disclosure, Ink boundary, strong trigger type, Green expanded signal, Violet focus seam, restrained radius, and reduced-motion-safe reveal establish the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Localized stateText renders an immediate sighted open or closed cue without duplicating aria-expanded for assistive technology.

api.enableWhen: Pass localized closed and open React content to Collapsible.Trigger; the active value must have accessible content.

disabledBehavior.ui: No extra state text is rendered when stateText is omitted or its active value is null, false, or empty.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Controlled or uncontrolled disclosure behavior is unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No state-text-specific event or callback occurs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No extra presentation node or duplicate state copy is exposed; aria-expanded remains authoritative.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated native-button disclosure semantics, state-copy isolation, keyboard, axe, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion coverage is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers controlled/uncontrolled state, native keyboard/pointer activation, disabled behavior, and clean optional-output removal.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Pagination composes finite page links, previous/next actions, and ellipses; an explicit server-owned cursor contract without a fabricated total remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora offers a discriminated cursor mode for server-owned sequences while preserving real-link progressive enhancement and safe destination validation in both modes.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas controls, Ink structure, a Green current-page signal, strong current type, the shared Violet focus seam, restrained corners, and purposeful state transitions establish the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Explicit cursor mode represents server-owned previous/current/next navigation without inventing a page count or weakening safe-link validation.

api.enableWhen: Set mode to cursor and supply the current server-owned range label plus available cursor destinations.

disabledBehavior.ui: Finite page links, current page, and ellipses render instead of cursor-only controls.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Navigation uses page, pageCount, and getHref; cursor labels and destinations are not evaluated.
disabledBehavior.events: onNavigate receives page numbers rather than cursor directions.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No cursor currentLabel or cursor-only previous/next relationship is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated landmark, real-link, current-page, disabled, safe-href, mode-isolation, axe, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, and touch coverage is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers page/cursor discrimination, real and safe links, disabled navigation, current locations, and clean mode isolation.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Tabs supplies tablist, tab, and panel composition with keyboard selection; concise keyboard-discovery context remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora optionally connects visible keyboard-discovery copy to the tablist accessible description while preserving React Aria collection prepass, orientation, activation, disabled, and RTL behavior.

visualSignature.summary: An Ink tab baseline, Green selected underline, literal Canvas panel, strong tab type, the shared Violet focus seam, restrained corners, and reduced-motion-safe transitions form the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Tabs.List may render localized keyboard guidance and connect it to the tablist without changing the interaction model.

api.enableWhen: Pass concise non-empty localized accessible content to Tabs.List.

disabledBehavior.ui: No keyboard hint is rendered when keyboardHint is omitted, null, false, or empty.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Tab focus, selection, orientation, and activation follow the ordinary tabs path.
disabledBehavior.events: No hint-specific behavior or event occurs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No hint id, node, or aria-describedby contribution is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated tablist/tab/panel relationships, keyboard hint isolation, orientation, activation, disabled, RTL, axe, narrow, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and touch coverage is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers automatic/manual activation, orientation, RTL spatial keys, disabled skipping, safe URL state, and clean hint removal.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps the current destination in the primary mobile rail while optionally recovering lower-priority destinations through a native disclosure with safe real links.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas, a decisive Ink top rule, Green current marker, strong labels, Violet focus geometry, restrained overlay corners, and safe-area-aware touch targets establish the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A deterministic maximum-visible policy preserves the current destination and exposes the remaining safe links through native details.

api.enableWhen: Pass overflow with a localized label and maximumVisible of at least two.

disabledBehavior.ui: No overflow list, summary, or details element renders.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Every destination remains in the primary list and layout calculation takes the plain path.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No extra summary, nested list, disclosure state, or accessible name is exposed.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Consumer route state can occupy a stable contextual rail with busy and live semantics.

api.enableWhen: Pass a routeStatus state and localized text.

disabledBehavior.ui: No route-status rail or text renders.

disabledBehavior.events: No status-specific event or callback exists.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Native progress, visible consumer-formatted recovery context, and polite step announcements can be enabled independently around the same controlled or uncontrolled step state.

api.enableWhen: Enable any of the three process-context props independently.

disabledBehavior.ui: No progress bar, summary output, or announcement node renders for the corresponding false or omitted prop.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Ordered step state and optional navigation remain on the ordinary path.
disabledBehavior.events: No summary formatter or announcement-specific behavior runs when its option is omitted.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No progress semantics, formatted context, role=status, live region, or announcement text is exposed for disabled options.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: The official Shadcn catalog has link and navigation building blocks but no dedicated table of contents; heading extraction and current-section observation remain consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora pairs a consumer-run heading extractor with optional uncontrolled IntersectionObserver tracking and localized current-section context without owning scrolling or URL mutation.

visualSignature.summary: A literal Canvas reading rail, strong Ink rule, Green current-location seam, Violet focus geometry, deliberate heading hierarchy, restrained context surface, and logical indentation identify Mergora.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Observation and current-section summary are separately selectable and preserve consumer control over headings, hashes, scrolling, and routers.

api.enableWhen: Pass observeCurrent for uncontrolled observation and/or renderCurrentSummary for visible context.

disabledBehavior.ui: No current-section output renders when its formatter is omitted.
disabledBehavior.behavior: False observation leaves current state controlled or link-driven and creates no observer.
disabledBehavior.events: No observer callbacks or summary formatter calls occur for disabled options.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No observation attribute, summary output, context text, or supplementary accessibility output is exposed.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: The official Shadcn catalog has Dialog and Popover primitives but no dedicated non-blocking product tour; route readiness, skip policy, focus policy, and target recovery remain consumer work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora provides skippable non-modal guidance that never blocks application access, with separately selectable route callbacks, progress, announcements, and explicit missing-target recovery.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas guidance, a strong Ink boundary, Green primary action, restrained Violet progress/focus, measured overlay corners, spatial anchoring, and an instant reduced-motion path form the Mergora signature.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A consumer route adapter and missing-target retry contract make cross-route guidance recoverable without polling, focus trapping, or hidden navigation.

api.enableWhen: Enable only the routing, recovery, progress, and announcement capabilities the tour needs.

disabledBehavior.ui: No recovery status, retry button, progress counter, or announcement node renders for disabled options.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The tour remains skippable, non-modal, and locally step-driven with no route or retry behavior.
disabledBehavior.events: No route adapter, target-retry callback, recovery event, or announcement-specific path runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No recovery role=status, retry control/name, progress copy, live region, or announcement text is exposed.
